texto: Be bold and never feel shy to consult people. You may appear like a stupid person for few minutes if you ask questions
autor: but you are likely to be a fool forever if you don’t ask at all.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a but you are likely to be a fool forever if you don’t ask at all.: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes. O trecho “Be bold and never feel shy to consult people. You may appear like a stupid person for few minutes…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que motivacao, israelmore-ayivor, shaping-the-dream pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de shaping-the-dream.
